prompt: Two young Japanese women. A blonde and healthily tanned gyaru and a long black-haired gyaru with fair skin and a clean-cut style are submerged up to their shoulders in a night pool, looking up at large fireworks exploding in the night sky. The vivid light from the fireworks illuminates their expressions and the water surface, creating a fantastical atmosphere. The blonde gyaru has a bright, moved smile, while the clean-cut gyaru has a gentle, elegant smile. The background features the lighting of a luxury hotel and the city's night view. A scene from an emotional summer youth movie, photorealistic, high-definition, cinematic lighting, TV-style. 16:9
